title: Spanish Chicken and Tortilla Espanola
description: A flavorful and satisfying gluten-free dish made with chicken, tortilla, and Spanish-inspired ingredients.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the skillet over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the diced tortilla española to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Stir in the diced nourishing omelette mix and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the sliced chicken with the tortilla española mixture spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
